title: Filtering Hoppers
description: Free and open source alternative to other hopper filtering plugins. Filter your items now!
body:
Ever dreamt of having a free, high quality and up to date hopper filtering plugin?

Filtering Hoppers is exactly what you've been looking for. It's a free, high quality, up to date and open source alternative to other hopper filtering plugins you can find out there. It even supports Folia!

It can also collect items either in a chunk, or in a radius around hoppers and limit the amount of hoppers in a chunk, effectively reducing lag by lowering hopper checks every tick and item entities on the ground!

Adding items to a hopper's filter is as easy as shift + right clicking a hopper and clicking items in your inventory. You can change back and forth between a whitelist and a blacklist by clicking on the white or black glass pane in the corner of the filter!

And for those of you who happen to have communities with members who don't all speak the same language, everything in this plugin is translatable!
If you wish to add languages or edit the pre-existing languages for your players, simply follow the instructions given in any of both language files distributed with the plugin in the plugins/FilteringHoppers/lang folder!
